description: ComputeSDK is a developer tool for creating and managing isolated code-execution sandboxes across multiple providers through a unified TypeScript interface. It also publishes provider benchmark content and documentation for configuring third-party sandbox backends.
summary: ComputeSDK exposes public JavaScript/TypeScript SDK packages on npm and documentation on computesdk.com; I found no documented HTTP/REST, GraphQL, MCP, or standalone CLI surface on computesdk.com itself.
